payload.answer: Event recorded; duplicate delivery detected but preserved as a single memory entry to avoid losing context. No change to current memory state.

entity_resolution.reason: duplicate delivery of the same event; resolution deferred until confirmation if deduplication is required

memory_cards.statement: Same Slack event ID delivered twice for: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Event stored as a memory_card with id reflecting the Slack event occurrence; duplicates acknowledged but not re-stored as separate entries

repair_options: flag duplicate as deduplicated on ingest
merge duplicates if a second identical event arrives with identical metadata
